_classThresholdsNote: Per-class thresholds seeded by GFS-PY-T1 (operator-confirmed 2026-06-25). The flat softThresholdLines/hardThresholdLines fields are retained as a backward-compatible fallback for any in-scope file that resolves to no specific class.

exceptions.rationale: Dispatch-quality monolith is the central nervous system of work-order validation. It predates the class-aware Python size guard and must be split with order and evidence, not in one regression-prone rewrite.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: Split per the GFS-PY roadmap T1-T4 (docs/roadmaps/CVF_GOVERNED_PYTHON_FILE_SIZE_COVERAGE_ROADMAP_2026-06-25.md): T1 markdown table/source-verification helpers, T2 lifecycle/status validators, T3 source-verification/token-collision validators, T4 orchestrator shell. Do NOT add a new validator directly to this file; new validators go into a split module. Frozen at current line count: any touch must keep net line delta <= 0.

exceptions.rationale: Cumulative dispatch-quality test suite predates the class-aware Python size guard. It is the behavior-preserving regression anchor for the GFS-PY T1-T4 split and cannot be safely shrunk before those splits land.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: Mirror the GFS-PY T1-T4 split: as validators move into dedicated modules, move their tests into matching dedicated test files. Frozen at current line count: any touch must keep net line delta <= 0; new tranche tests go into dedicated files.

exceptions.rationale: Active-archive CLI orchestrator predates the class-aware Python size guard and concentrates multiple archive operations in one entrypoint.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: Extract archive operation groups (rotation, manifest, hygiene) into dedicated modules before the next substantive active-archive feature change. Frozen at current line count: any touch must keep net line delta <= 0.

exceptions.rationale: Agent automation assist helper predates the class-aware Python size guard and aggregates many early-diagnostic assemblers in one CLI surface.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: Extract diagnostic-assembly groups into dedicated helper modules before the next substantive automation-assist expansion. Frozen at current line count: any touch must keep net line delta <= 0.

exceptions.rationale: Cumulative automation-assist test suite predates the class-aware Python size guard.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: As automation-assist helpers split into dedicated modules, move their tests into matching dedicated test files. Frozen at current line count: any touch must keep net line delta <= 0.

exceptions.rationale: Autorun workflow gate predates the class-aware Python size guard and sits near the 800-line cli orchestrator hard threshold. GFS-PY-T1 added the four-line wiring that registers this very Python size guard into the shared autorun command list, pushing it from 774 to 778 lines and into the near-hard band; this one-time +4 is the cost of self-registering the guard.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: Extract the phase-command builders into dedicated modules before the next substantive autorun gate expansion. Frozen at 778 lines: any further touch must keep net line delta <= 0; new phase commands that grow the file require a same-batch extraction.

exceptions.rationale: Local governance hook-chain runner predates the class-aware Python size guard and is the registry plus parallel-runner for every local hook stage; it sits just above the 800-line cli orchestrator hard threshold. GFS-PY-T1 added the two-line-pair wiring that registers this very Python size guard into the local pre-commit and pre-push chains, raising the frozen line from 882 to 890; this one-time +8 is the cost of self-registering the guard and is the last allowed growth.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: Extract the check-registry tables (REVIEWER_FAST_CHECKS and siblings) and the parallel-runner mechanics into dedicated modules before the next substantive hook-chain expansion. Frozen at 890 lines: any further touch must keep net line delta <= 0; adding a new check entry that grows the file requires a same-batch extraction.
